title: litsea citriodora
intro: Litsea citriodora, also known as the mountain pepper tree or citronella leaf, is a tropical tree native to Australia and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Lauraceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Litsea citriodora include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Litsea citriodora can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in cooking and as a natural insect repellent.
